notes: npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities. All previous eng/chore PRs merged. CSS perf: 16 transition:all replaced with specific properties. Coding: renderOwnerBadge helper extracted. Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates still need issue discussion. CDN dep pinning is future work.
